element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Y and B button hold mechanics for Ki blast attacks
L and R button directional movement
Radar positioning awareness across split view

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Engagement-based rhythm; tension scales with match proximity and health differential; relief cycles triggered by successful offensive actions or defensive blocks

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introductory opponent selection with basic combat mechanics; tutorial-adjacent through gameplay
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Intermediate opponents with varied special move usage and transformation mechanics
difficulty_curve.late_game: Advanced AI utilizing meteor combos, Ki management, and strategic positioning

notable_level_patterns.description: Sequential one-on-one matches advancing through tournament progression; linear elimination format with escalating opponent difficulty
Player-selected opponent matchups with customizable character selection; no progression structure, pure skill-based engagement
Nine playable characters plus one unlockable, each with distinct move sets, transformations, and playstyles; roster designed to support varied strategic approaches
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Character selection across all game modes

notable_level_patterns.description: Spatial awareness challenge where fighters at distance remain visible through split-screen technique; radar mechanic assists navigation awareness
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All match types with distance engagement
